step.title: Self-Review
step.goal: Walk the ticket body section-by-section, comparing each section to the severity ladder's example defects. Produce a self-review finding report in the ladder's output format.

substep.title: Walk Each Section
substep.action:
For every level-2 section in the ticket body, evaluate:
- Does the section honor its scope note from the Structure Outline? - Does the section honor AGENT-BRIEF principles (durability, behavioral, complete AC, explicit scope, self-sufficient, decisions-not-tactics, consistency with Design Summary)? - Do wiki-links resolve: for each `[[X]]` or `[[X|alias]]`, is `X` (the token before any `|`) a real filename stem? An alias that merely appears somewhere is NOT a resolved link. - Does the section content match the relevant Q&A entries (no drift from resolved questions)? - Does the section honor every locked DR's decision (no contradiction)?
For each defect found, compose a finding per the severity ladder's output format (severity, location, finding, fix recommendation, impact for Medium+).

substep.title: Check Frontmatter
substep.action:
Run `thoughts validate {{ticket_path}}` and capture any validation errors. These become Critical findings if any appear (frontmatter schema violations per the ladder).
Manually verify: - Both owner and researcher fields present - last_updated is full ISO 8601 datetime - parent and children targets are real filename stems (the token before any `|`), not bare aliases - status is 'draft' (will transition in step 5) - aliases array has canonical alias first - tags array primary tag matches the slug's primary tag

substep.title: Check Pre-Flight Flags
substep.action:
From the load summary's pre-flight check, evaluate:
- **Foundational strikes > 0**: surface as a High finding ("Foundational reversal strike >0 on entry — review for accumulated incoherence even though user pushed past") - **Force-exit at readiness gate**: surface as a High finding ("Force-exit at readiness gate — gaps in Q↔R were deliberately accepted; verify whether the ticket compensates") - **Length deviation > 50%**: surface as a High finding ("Section length deviation N% — review for missing content or scope creep")

substep.title: Compose Self-Review Report
Display Self-Review Summary

section.title: Walk discipline
section.description: Walk each section SEPARATELY. A "this section is fine" finding is informative but not recorded — only defects are. A clean ticket produces zero findings, which is the goal.

rules.rule: 3 findings is not better than 1 finding; the goal is "all real defects surfaced", not "find at least N"
Padding with Low findings to look thorough dilutes the signal
Splitting one issue into 3 findings to look thorough is the same dilution
